title: Tulsi
desc: Tulsi and Manieri are twin sisters. Ganesh Singh, an army man, falls in love with Tulsi with her father refuses to give him Tulsi as he hails from a low class. Moorat Singh and Manthra are busy bodies of the village, arrange for her marriage with a greedy Thakur.

title: Param Dharam
desc: Savitri believes that her illegitimate child with her deceased lover, Vijay, was stillborn and did not survive. Years later, Savitri's world changes when she learns that her firstborn is alive.

title: Dil Tera Aashiq
desc: Thakur Ranvir Singh Chaudhary cuts ties with his sister after she marries a man from a different background. However, when she dies, the responsibility of looking after her children falls on him.

title: Gunda Gardi
desc: A righteous police commissioner, Karan Singh, tries to nab the notorious mafia duo, Narasimha and Kalicharan. After his brother-in-law gets murdered, he plans to take help from the eye-witness, Deepa, to get hold of the criminals.

title: Sautela Bhai
desc: Tulsiram is a village teacher who is married to Saraswati and has a step-brother, Rajaram, who lives in Bombay. When Rajaram returns, Tulsiram wants him to marry someone he has chosen but he has already chosen a wife.
